git.tag_owner_note: Run scripts/verify-v0.3.1-alpha-publication.py --expected-sha <tag-target-sha> immediately before pushing the tag. Refresh git.sha if the merge strategy changes the tag target.

public.title: v0.3.1-alpha release manifest and publication gate
service diagnostics v2 setup and support integration

private_registry.title: registry catalog quality and allowlist health reports
hub distribution allowlist reconciliation with canonical 315-skill audit

private_registry_reconciliation.note: Publication remains in review until private registry reconciliation PR #10 is accepted.

production_signed_registry_artifacts.note: Final publication verifier must fail by default until production signing reports production_signed/passed, or until a release owner explicitly accepts this blocked registry signing state as a v0.3.1-alpha known issue.

distribution.pypi_deferral: PyPI is not the supported v0.3.1-alpha distribution path because router skills, installers, schemas, docs, bundled packs, and support diagnostics must be present beside the checkout.

feature_scope: v0.3.1 stabilization docs and smoke evidence
service diagnostics v2 setup and support integration
final publication gate for production-signed registry artifacts
private registry catalog quality report dependency
private registry hub allowlist reconciliation dependency
known_limitations: Developer preview, not a production SLA.
PyPI is not the supported v0.3.1-alpha distribution path.
Archive bytes are SHA256-verified and safely extracted, not archive-byte signed.
Private registry reconciliation remains in review until PR #10 is accepted.
Production-signed registry artifacts remain blocked until a registry operator completes the protected signing ceremony, or a release owner explicitly accepts the blocked state as a known issue.
Enterprise Skill Lock is an opt-in local policy MVP; managed sync is implemented but business dashboard, SSO, SCIM, billing, and broad organization controls are not implemented.
required_test_commands: python scripts/verify-v0.3.1-alpha-publication.py --allow-registry-signing-blocked --release-owner-override-reason "Release owner explicitly accepts blocked production registry signing as a v0.3.1-alpha known issue."
release_owner_actions: Review and merge public PR #34, #35, #36, #37, and #38 in dependency order, or supersede PR #37 with this final publication branch.
Review private registry PR #9, #10, #11, #12, #15, and #18 before final release acceptance.
Do not run the default publication verifier without production signing unless the release owner explicitly accepts blocked registry signing as a known issue.
Refresh git.sha if the merge strategy changes the final tag target.
Create tag v0.3.1-alpha only after human release-owner approval.
Create a GitHub prerelease with docs/releases/v0.3.1-alpha.md as release notes.
